title: Crispy Uruguayan Liver Delight
description: A nutty, crisp dish featuring chicken liver in a deglazed sauce for those sick-day cravings, with pescatarian-friendly options.

ingredients.name: 1 cup stale bread crumbs
ingredients.notes: Use stale bread to achieve crispiness

ingredients.name: 2 chicken livers
ingredients.notes: Approximate size for serving as a snack

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup white wine (or any deglazing liquid)
ingredients.notes: For pescatarian version, use vegetable broth instead of white wine

instructions: To make breadcrumbs, combine bread crumbs with a pinch of salt. Mix well.
Season livers lightly with salt and pepper on both sides.
Heat olive oil in an oven-safe skillet over medium heat. Add liver and cook for about 4-6 minutes per side until golden brown, browning the outside slightly to ensure crispiness.
Once cooked, place liver directly into the bread crumb mixture, coating evenly.
Pour deglazing liquid into a measuring cup and carefully pour it back over the oven-safe skillet. Let the steam create some sizzle as you transfer both ingredients together to an oven-proof dish.
Bake in preheated oven for 15-20 minutes or until breadcrumbs are golden brown and the liver is cooked through.
